query:
SELECT 
  pr.id,
  pr.month,
  pr.cost,
  pr.paymentStatus,
  pr.postDate,
  c.name as channelName
FROM purchaseRecords pr
JOIN channels c ON pr.channelId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%идеальный%'
ORDER BY pr.month DESC, pr.id DESC
LIMIT 30;
